description: You are a safety engineer performing a post-incident review of the Failure Mode and Effects Analysis (FMEA) in the RISKS document. Following a database migration error, restore the severity, detectability, and probability scores for CAUSE entries RISKS-40 and RISKS-44 to appropriate non-zero values (1-10 scale) based on the failure context. Update corrective action RISKS-26 with responsibility 'QA Lead' and target date '2026-06-30', and corrective action RISKS-45 with responsibility 'Development Lead' and target date '2026-09-30'. In the SRS document, create a mitigation traceability link from SRS-160 to RISKS-44. The RISKS document is organized as: Failure Modes (FAIL) contain Causes (CAUSE), which contain Corrective Actions (ACT). The application is already open with the project loaded.
